title: fix: Delete embeddings when deleting messages and threads

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix: Cleanup Memory message in vector store
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relevance: Addresses the exact same problem: deleting vector embeddings when messages/threads are deleted. Merged 5 days ago.

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(memory): sync vector database when updating messages
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relevance: Related fix for syncing vector DB on message updates, which this PR's approach also partially touches.

relatedIssues.title: [BUG] Message embeddings do not get deleted

summary: Adds embedding deletion logic to Memory.deleteMessages() and Memory.deleteThread() so that vector embeddings are cleaned up when messages or threads are removed. Includes integration tests for the new behavior and a typo fix (getResuableTests -> getReusableTests). The PR was well-structured with tests, a changeset, and clear description.
maintainerNotes: This PR is almost certainly superseded by PR #12227 (merged 2026-03-05), which implements the same fix — cascading cleanup of vector embeddings when deleting messages/threads. The related issue #6604 is already closed. The PR has merge conflicts and CI checks are stuck in PENDING. Despite being a well-written contribution, the work has been independently completed and merged. Recommend closing with a thank-you to the author for identifying the issue.
